headlines.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

headlines.title: Trump touts U.S. economy and oil prices in a midterm pitch in Pennsylvania
headlines.description: Speaking in a key Pennsylvania swing district, President Donald Trump sought to reassure voters that costs are coming down as the war with Iran ends.

headlines.title: Zohran Mamdani’s clout and a double Trump endorsement on the line in today’s primaries
headlines.description: The parties will also set up a handful of key House battleground races as voters in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah pick nominees.

headlines.title: Senate approves war powers resolution in symbolic move rebuking Trump on Iran
headlines.description: The Senate approved a war powers resolution that rebukes President Trump by calling for an end to the war in Iran. While the vote is largely symbolic, it is a rare bipartisan pushback regarding the war.

headlines.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match
headlines.description: A spokesperson said the department will allow Iran to travel to its next game location a day early.

headlines.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race
headlines.description: After tallying four goals in his first two World Cup games, the Manchester City striker is challenging Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé for the honor.

headlines.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
headlines.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match
headlines.description: A spokesperson said the department will allow Iran to travel to its next game location a day early.

headlines.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race
headlines.description: After tallying four goals in his first two World Cup games, the Manchester City striker is challenging Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappé for the honor.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: Dunga y el duro dardo a Inglaterra tras no ganarle a Ghana: "Es predecible" | Pasión Mundial
headlines.description: El brasileño analizó el juego de los ingleses y aseguró que mostraron lo mismo que siempre en cancha, por lo que le han facilitado a sus rivales interpretarlos y que les saquen puntos; por su parte, Roque Santa Cruz los mantiene como favoritos al título.
